extracted.title: COMPLETED: Corinth Compressor Station (CorinSEG) Eff. Eve Cycle for Gas Day March 28, 2026
extracted.description:
Columbia Gulf Transmission, LLC (CGT) notifies customers that maintenance on Corinth Compressor Station unit 507 is now complete. As a result, the backhaul capacity through CorinSEG will be reinstated to Total Capacity effective Evening Cycle for Gas Day March 28, 2026.

Please contact your Customer Services Representative with any questions.

***Previous Posting***

Columbia Gulf Transmission LLC (CGT) notifies customers of upcoming maintenance at Corinth Compressor Station for a control systems upgrade on Unit 507 beginning on Tuesday, January 6, 2026 through Friday, March 6, 2026. As a result, the backhaul capacity through CorinSEG will be reduced to 2,325,000 Dth effective Timely Cycle for Gas Day Tuesday, January 6, 2026.

At this time, CGT does not anticipate an impact to nominations through CorinSEG.

CorinSEG
• Estimated Capacity Setting: 2,325,000 Dth
• Design Capacity: 2,540,656 Dth
• Posted Percentage: 92%

Due to the potential impact to firm service, CGT encourages customers to monitor the scheduled volumes on the Operationally Available Capacity screen on Informational Postings, as nominations can fluctuate based on market conditions.

Reservation Charge Credits (RCCs) will be determined per the process set forth in the General Terms and Conditions, Section 40 of CGT’s FERC Gas Tariff (Tariff). By means of this notice, CGT is establishing the 7-day Average Usage Quantity to be the period of December 22 – December 28, 2025, pursuant to the provisions in the Tariff.

Please contact your Customer Services Representative with any questions.
